artifacts.claim_boundary: This witness binds the immutable target-owned native receipt to its exact run, checks, and non-calibration native obligations.

claim_boundary: SkillGuard supervises the complete native kb-sleep-maintenance maintenance unit, its target-specific obligations, and the sole current enforced closure. It does not ship with or execute on the consumer machine.

depth_profile.claim_boundary: Only exact current receipts for the target skill's declared checks are supervised. The target skill retains all domain judgment, including positive/shallow behavior and direct native completion.

functions.business_intent: Consume new evidence incrementally, own every durable knowledge-lifecycle decision, and publish the sole canonical LogicGuard model generation.
functions.signature: Input x State -> Set(Output x State)

obligations.description: Acquire or safely recover the lane, then bind the exact open batch or freeze one finite batch after the committed watermark.
Bind one finite immutable item set, input watermark and digest, current generation, prior convergence streak, tested target size, and HEAD digests; later arrivals do not expand it.
Give every settled frozen item one durable completed or explicitly blocked disposition without repeating verified work.
Persist a digest-bound batch checkpoint whose completed, blocked, and pending item sets are exact and resumable.
Resolve candidates through bounded evidence-backed terminal or reopenable outcomes.
Use verified outcomes and contradictions for promotion, suspension, and downgrade through one shared evidence index per review cycle.

Represent every admitted card as an exact LogicGuard model revision with a root claim, context and method, typed support or challenge nodes, and an explicit disposition ledger for gaps instead of invented support.
Assemble exact model revisions into a scoped ModelMesh and admit canonical cross-model relations only with qualifying non-AI provenance; co-use and legacy links remain unresolved proposals.
Consume each typed Dream handoff at most once.
Publish the complete model, mesh, deterministic projection, active index, generation manifest, and pointer as one rollbackable generation with the pointer last.
Publish a validated active index and advance the watermark only after durable success.
Reconcile previous, newly eligible, opening, settled, closing, and net-reduction counts under one versioned rule.
On progress_saved, completed-with-blocks, failed, open-batch, or backlog-growing outcomes, prove Dream and both organization descendants were not run.
Keep the committed watermark and prior validated generation unchanged on progress_saved or failure, isolate malformed siblings without replaying completed work, and never infer hard-timeout success.
Reject shallow proposal-only completion and require the full native receipt.

action.summary: Load the target-owned inputs and prove every intake obligation before mutation.
Run the native maintenance owner through every declared execution branch.
Require the current terminal receipt plus positive and shallow target-owned checks before closure.
